prose: **Pyridine frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: input from a provided .xyz file (`/home/erobles/.../pyridine.xyz`), not re-optimized at DFT. SCF converged in 10 cycles. HOMO = −7.25260 eV, LUMO = −1.11279 eV → **HOMO–LUMO gap ≈ 6.1398 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap). No warnings were reported. Calculation integrity: trustworthy. Command for reproduction: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --solvent gas /home/erobles/.../pyridine.xyz`.
